expected_issues.description: isOrderedFilled is a boolean prop that is only valid when variant='ordered'. This creates an impossible state — isOrderedFilled={true} with variant='unordered' has no meaning. The correct approach is to encode it as its own variant value: variant='ordered-filled'.

Proposing separate UnorderedList and OrderedList top-level components reduces discoverability — consumers searching for 'List' in the component library would not find UnorderedList. A single List component with a variant prop is the correct approach.
List.Item and List.Item.Link use dot notation which requires assigning child components to the parent object, breaking tree-shaking. Blade's convention is flat named exports: ListItem, ListItemLink.
